# service-portals

Service Portals are simple HTTP/HTTPS proxy servers that run inside a Kubernetes cluster, and make it easier to consume services that run outside the cluster.

## Installation from source

To install or deploy this package from source, you should use the `ap` tool (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gke-labs/gke-labs-infra/main/ap/llms.txt).

The expected command to deploy everything from this project to the current kubernetes cluster is:

```bash
IMAGE_PREFIX=example.com/foo ap deploy //...
```
